name: ZA Bank Tokenized Deposits

issuer.name: ZA Bank Limited
issuer.type: Hong Kong virtual bank (HKMA Type 1 banking license)

auditor.name: PwC Hong Kong (per ZA Bank annual audit)

summary: First Hong Kong virtual bank to announce participation in tokenized deposit infrastructure. ZA Bank's product roadmap includes retail-accessible tokenized HKD deposits leveraging Project Ensemble settlement rails. Significant as virtual banks (originally formed under HKMA's 2020 virtual banking initiative) entering institutional tokenization layer — bridging the retail crypto-curious customer base with the wholesale tokenization infrastructure being built for traditional banks.

sources.title: ZA Bank participation in HK digital asset initiatives
HKMA Project Ensemble participating institutions (Annex B)

underlying_asset: HKD bank deposit liability at ZA Bank.
reserve_composition: 1:1 with deposit liability per HKMA supervision; ZA Bank Type 1 banking license requirements.
secondary_market: Per Project Ensemble framework; retail accessibility TBD.
upgrade_authority: ZA Bank Limited management under HKMA supervision.

timeline.event: ZA Bank announces digital asset roadmap including tokenized deposits
ZA Bank participation in EnsembleTX pilot phase begins
